heading: A ydych chi eisoes wedi gwneud cais am help gyda'ch ffi gwrth-hawliad?
question: A ydych chi eisoes wedi gwneud cais am help gyda'ch ffi gwrth-hawliad?
revealedHwfQuestionLabel: Nodwch eich cyfeirnod Help i Dalu Ffioedd
revealedHwfQuestionHint: cyYou will have received this number when you applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.cyFor example, HWF-A1B-23C
